refined_prompt: Recreate this street scene as a polished, realistic daytime image while preserving the four visible cars, road, buildings, lawn, and clear weather.
added_visual_details: Highlight the sunlight casting soft shadows of the cars on the road.
Enhance the texture and details of the building facades to reflect a clean and modern architectural style.
Include realistic details of pavement textures and road markings.
Add depth to the scene with more detailed greenery on the lawn, creating a lush appearance.
Ensure the sky is a vivid blue with minimal clouds to maintain the clear weather condition.
